summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TC Pro Dojo Shop page rebuild. All 19 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend tests pass - Shop page displays products with prices, sizes, Add to Cart buttons; Cart drawer works with quantity controls; Checkout form has all required fields (name, email, phone, shipping address); Shipping info shows 3 rate tiers and 4-week delivery note. Admin Products page (/admin/products) shows product management form and product cards. Admin Dashboard includes Shop Products tile with count.

issues: Products show placeholder package icon instead of actual product images - images need to be uploaded via Cloudinary

action_items: Upload actual product images to Cloudinary and update product imageUrl fields
critical_code_review_comments: Shop.js correctly implements product grid with data-testid attributes for testing
Cart drawer opens/closes properly with quantity controls (+/-) and remove button
Checkout form includes all required fields: name, email, phone, street, city, province, country, postal_code, notes
Shipping zone calculation works correctly: QC=$10, Canada=$15, International=$25
Stripe checkout integration uses emergentintegrations library with real test key (sk_test_emergent)
Order status polling implemented for payment confirmation after Stripe redirect
Admin Products page has full CRUD functionality with proper auth protection
Admin Dashboard shows Shop Products tile with product count (2 products)
Email notifications configured: customer confirmation from info@tcprodojo.com, admin notification to druonyx@gmail.com
seed_data_creation: Used existing 2 test products: TC Pro Dojo T-Shirt ($35.00, id: 910e18c3-1dcb-49a9-b817-523643aa38a1) and TC Pro Dojo Hoodie ($65.00, id: c9af6660-64bd-41bb-8840-4333f4edd8dc). Both have sizes S, M, L, XL, 2XL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page fully functional at /shop. Products displayed in grid with size selectors and Add to Cart buttons. Cart drawer slides in from right with quantity controls. Checkout form collects customer info and shipping address, calculates shipping based on zone (QC/Canada/International), redirects to Stripe for payment. Admin Products page at /admin/products allows CRUD operations on products. Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library with sk_test_emergent key. Email sending uses Resend API.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/shop/shipping-rates: Returns rates ($10/$15/$25) and delivery note - PASS
backend_endpoints.POST /api/shop/checkout: Creates order + Stripe session, returns checkout_url - PASS

frontend_shop_page.product_grid: Displays products with name, price, description, sizes - WORKING
frontend_shop_page.size_selector: Dropdown for selecting product size - WORKING
frontend_shop_page.add_to_cart: Button adds item to cart - WORKING
frontend_shop_page.cart_fab: Floating cart button shows item count and total - WORKING
frontend_shop_page.cart_drawer: Slide-out drawer with cart items, quantity controls, remove button - WORKING
frontend_shop_page.checkout_form: All fields present: name, email, phone, street, city, province, country, postal_code, notes - WORKING
frontend_shop_page.shipping_info: Shows 3 rate tiers (QC $10, Canada $15, Intl $25) and 4-week delivery note - WORKING
frontend_shop_page.pay_button: Shows total with shipping, redirects to Stripe - WORKING

frontend_admin_products.product_form: All fields: name, price, image URL, sizes, description, active checkbox - WORKING
frontend_admin_products.product_cards: Shows existing products with edit/delete buttons - WORKING

admin_dashboard.shop_products_tile: Shows product count (2) with link to /admin/products - WORKING
